title: ceropegia × hybrida
intro: Ceropegia × hybrida, also known as the string of hearts or rosary vine, is a popular succulent plant species that is a hybrid of the Ceropegia woodii and Ceropegia jasminidium. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of consuming Ceropegia × hybrida are still being researched, but it is believed to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water.
